# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of the SP Programming Language seriously. If you discover a security vulnerability, please do NOT open a public issue. Instead, report it privately.

### Reporting Channels
- **Email**: Reach out to **nikolamatic225@gmail.com**.
- **Discord**: Contact **SwyftPain** directly.

### Our Commitment
We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and provide a timeline for a fix. We appreciate your help in keeping SP secure!
